title: AgentCore Managed Harness: Getting Started
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness is a service that eliminates manual container, storage, and orchestration configuration for deploying AI agents. It provides isolated micro VMs per session, persistent storage, cross-session memory, hot-swappable models and tools, and integrations with browser, code interpreter, and observability tools via JSON config and CLI deployment.
